programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Rocker in the Rinse Cycle
programme.desc: When the body of a rich adventure-seeker is found in a hotel laundry machine, Booth and Brennan are led to the last place he was seen: a Rock 'n' Roll Fantasy Camp.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Witch in the Wardrobe
programme.desc: When a cabin in the woods burns down, the bodies of two witches are revealed; Angela and Hodgins are arrested.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Boy With the Answer
programme.desc: Everyone at the Jeffersonian tries to uncover forensic evidence to help elicit a conviction in the trial of the Gravedigger.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Beginning in the End
programme.desc: The remains of a hoarder are discovered; Angela's father (Billy Gibbons) visits; Booth and Brennan are each confronted with unique opportunities.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Mastodon in the Room
programme.desc: The team helps Cam solve the case of an unidentified boy; after making personal discoveries, the members of the team realize they belong in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Couple in the Cave
programme.desc: The remains of a couple are found in a cave; Brennan re-evaluates her relationship with Booth when his girlfriend makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Radio Silence
programme.desc: A Navy captain is murdered during an appearance on a local radio show; Pride's daughter comes home to talk about her plans for the future.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: If It Bleeds, It Leads
programme.desc: Agent Brody sees a connection between the case of a sailor struck by a party bus and the death of her sister; the team gets ready for the city's St. Patrick's Day celebrations.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Means to an End
programme.desc: After Pride's daughter is attacked on campus, the team finds a surveillance van loaded with pictures of the special agent's every move.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Second Line
programme.desc: The team investigates when a Navy lieutenant is murdered during a traditional funeral procession in the French Quarter honoring the recently deceased.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: When a Navy lieutenant dies during a secret visit to a general's hotel, agent Pride and the team are asked to break protocol for the investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Help Wanted
programme.desc: While visiting her family's restaurant in the French Quarter, a Navy culinary specialist is the target of an explosion; in D.C., Brody tracks a lead in the Gen. Leak case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Third Man
programme.desc: NCIS teams with Homeland Security when the murder of a Navy master diver is discovered to be linked to the chatter concerning a foreign attack on the city.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Sleeping With the Enemy

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Na Keiki a Kalaihaohia
programme.desc: The corpse of a diamond smuggler is stolen from a graveyard; Five-0 tracks down his partner, who is determined to retrieve their latest batch of contraband; Adam recruits a new, confidential informant; Tani gets a devastating call.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: He Puko'a Kani 'Aina
programme.desc: McGarrett and Danny investigate the murder of a private detective whose client was killed the same way; Adam sends Jessie into a dangerous situation with disastrous consequences; Danny's uncle comes to town to help with the restaurant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: O Na Hoku O Ka Lani Wale No Kai 'Ike I Kahi O Pae
programme.desc: Tani and Junior go undercover as prospective parents to infiltrate a private school where the headmaster was murdered; Adam's life is on the line when he is held captive and forced to produce a massive amount of money.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Holapu Ke Ahi, Koe Iho Ka Lehu
programme.desc: Adam's mission to take down organized crime goes sideways when the bait he uses falls into the wrong hands; Adam begins to doubt Jessie's allegiance.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: E Ho'oko Kuleana
programme.desc: The ex-wife of the man who shot Danny reveals how Danny helped save her life; Tani and Junior are assigned to walk the beat as uniformed officers for the day; Adam is framed for the murder of the crime boss he has been tracking.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Aohe Mea Make I Ka Hewa; Make No I Ka Mihi Ole
programme.desc: A hit man McGarrett's father failed to arrest comes to McGarrett to finally confess his crimes and admit where he buried his victims; Jessie makes a dangerous decision that could ruin Adam's life.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: He Lokomaika'i Ka Manu O Kaiona
programme.desc: Catherine Rollins recruits McGarrett and Jerry to help track down uranium thought to be hidden on an abandoned Hawaiian island before a terrorist makes dirty bombs with it; Junior gets trapped in a ravine.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ahuwale Ka Nane Huna
programme.desc: Harry Langford enlists McGarrett and Danny's help to track down a teenage British royal who has run away while under his protection; Grover, Tani and Junior work a 25-year-old murder case after a mysterious videotape arrives at headquarters.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Kopi Wale No I Ka I'a a 'Eu No Ka Ilo
programme.desc: Duke is forced to steal crucial evidence from the police locker in exchange for his kidnapped granddaughter; Jerry goes undercover at a mental health facility to solve a murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ka Hana a Ka Makua, O Ka Hana No Ia a Keiki
programme.desc: McGarrett and Five-0 take on the mob when a former boss is killed; Junior's friend is on the run after witnessing the murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ka Lala Kaukonakona Haki 'Ole I Ka Pa a Ka Makani Kona
programme.desc: McGarrett joins Junior and his SEAL team on a mission to capture an elusive person who is holding his mentor hostage; Gerard Hirsch and Kamekona help Grover and Tani on a murder case involving art stolen by Nazis during World War II.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Waiho Wale Kahiko
programme.desc: The team discovers a Russian spy ring hiding on Oahu when a Russian submarine appears off the coast.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ka 'Owili 'Oka'i
programme.desc: After McGarrett's CIA agent friend is killed, he lets himself be captured by the group he thinks is responsible to find the killer; Tani questions whether she should tell McGarrett about the murder weapon she found at Adam's house.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ke Kanaka I Ha'ule Mai Ka Lewa Mai
programme.desc: When a vacationing father on a flight to Honolulu is kidnapped and forced to parachute midflight, Danny, Tani and Junior track him through the jungle to discover that he may not be who he seems; McGarrett is threatened with a secret from his past.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Mimiki Ke Kai, Ahuwale Ka Papa Leho
programme.desc: A heat wave hits Oahu, contributing to a spike in crime; McGarrett and Danny hunt down a bank thief; Tani and Junior's car is stolen while they're on duty; Kamekona incites a riot by price-gouging his ice.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: A'ohe Kio Pohaku Nalo i Ke Alo Pali
programme.desc: Jerry accompanies Junior as he escorts a fallen soldier home to Oahu; McGarrett and Danny discover a body when they delve into the highly profitable black market for sand.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Shorthanded
programme.desc: The members of the team disregard Cabe's advice and go to Las Vegas for a casino job; a robbery leads to Walter being arrested.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: Walter and the team ask a troubled former associate for help when a nuclear reactor in Los Angeles is on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Father's Day
programme.desc: Three convicts -- including a brilliant hacker -- escape from prison; Paige tries to manage Ralph's expectations when his dad returns.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A musician -- who created a controversial algorithm to generate hit songs -- helps the team investigate the murder of a music blogger; Drew seeks help connecting with his son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Something in the Air, Part 1
programme.desc: As New Orleans grapples with the effects of COVID-19, Pride sends Tammy and Carter to investigate a suspicious death aboard an offshore humanitarian ship; Wade is overwhelmed by the high volume in the morgue due to COVID-19.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Something in the Air, Part 2
programme.desc: Tammy and Carter continue to investigate a suspicious death aboard a COVID-infected humanitarian ship; Pride and the team discover what may be the key to finding the killer; Wade helps a grieving woman.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Pride and the team take on a group of dirty cops when they discover that a murder victim was also a key witness in multiple excessive force cases; Tammy faces the reality of being in a new relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: We All Fall..
programme.desc: The team continue to investigate the murder of an officer who was about to blow the whistle on police misconduct; Pride must get creative in order to finally get rid of the dirty cops; the mayor asks Pride to join her new task force.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Operation Drano, Part I

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Operation Drano, Part II

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Leda and the Swan, Part I
programme.desc: A Navy therapist who is working to get justice for victims of sexual assault is murdered; Carter's mother confronts him when he refuses to talk to the FBI for a background check on her behalf.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.desc: As Pride and the team continue the investigation of an officer's assault and the murder of her therapist, NCIS zeroes in on a suspect who's been working the system for years; Carter and his mother talk about how they'll move forward after a mistake.

programme.sub-title: Runs in the Family

programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a petty officer whom Pride had mentored; Brody searches for a place to call home.

programme.sub-title: Carrier

programme.sub-title: The Recruits

programme.desc: Cabe's ex-wife needs the team's protection after she discovers evidence that suggests a prominent congressman's death involved foul play.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Talismans
programme.desc: The team must recover stealth technology from a military plane that was shot down in Bosnia; Walter's sister visits with Sylvester at the garage.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Revenge

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Dominoes

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Murder in a Flash

programme.sub-title: Hell Night

programme.desc: A wealthy recluse's corpse is found in a field with almost $1 million in counterfeit bills; Adam is abducted and forced to torture one of Gabriel's men.

programme.desc: The team questions members of a stunt biker gang when a killer escapes by jumping his motorcycle from roof to roof; the team prepares for Tough Mudder.

programme.sub-title: Hana Keaka

programme.desc: When a promising local boxer's brother is murdered, the prime suspect is an outspoken opponent -- the reigning champion.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.sub-title: Fire + Ashes + Legacy = Phoenix

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Red Cell + Quantum + Cold + Committed
programme.desc: Gen. John Acosta recruits MacGyver to steal a highly classified project from a military lab to find flaws in its security.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Kid + Plane + Cable + Truck
programme.desc: MacGyver and the team are on a plane that's in the air when the pilot has a heart attack.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Windmill + Acetone + Celluloid + Firing Pin
programme.desc: As MacGyver works quickly to rescue survivors from a collapsed building in Germany, he discovers a new safety threat -- an undetonated bomb from World War II is hidden beneath the rubble.

programme.sub-title: Soccer + Desi + Merchant + Titan
programme.desc: In an attempt to find the main players in the Codex and cut off their match-fixing funding, Desi goes under cover to infiltrate a soccer team and find the corrupt player working with the shadow organization.

programme.sub-title: Outlaw

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: All the Way Boys
programme.desc: A pair of conniving bush pilots crash-land in the Peruvian jungle, where they come across a community of diamond miners under the thumb of a greedy speculator.

programme.title: Alice, Sweet Alice
programme.desc: What's going on at that strange house at the end of the street, and why are little Alices' family members disappearing? Could Alice have anything to do with this? Noteworthy as Brooke Shields feature Debut.Genre:.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.desc: A hitchhiker gets arrested after a biker dies in a fight over a prostitute. In prison, he joins the boxing team to gain dominance and secure early parole from the toughest gang.

programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: The muscular Hercules performs his labors, sails with the Argonauts, and romances the fair Iole.

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: Walter Meyer (Danny Glover) is a retired mechanic who lost the love of his life one year earlier. Now that the holiday season is here, he invites daughters Rachel (Gabrielle Union) and Cheryl (Kimberly Elise) and sons Christian (Romany Malco) and Evan (Jessie T. Usher) to his house for a traditional celebration. Poor Walter soon realizes that if his bickering children and the rest of the family can spend five days together under the same roof, it will truly be a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Charlie Countryman

Yet, despite all the things he has attained, his one true love eludes him. 'Forrest Gump' is the story of a man who rose above his challenges, and who proved that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: The Family Fang

However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. He soon finds an unlikely savior in Tick Willis, a former fighter who trains the city's toughest amateur boxers. With his future on the line, Hope fights to reclaim the trust of those he loves the most.

Hazen apprehends the children, and before he can blink an eye, a simple necklace worn by one of the children sends his life spiraling back to medieval times. Now completely out of his.
